title: おれさまのごしゅじん
overview: From the POV of Miko's boastful shikigami "Kintoki", introducing their master-servant dynamic as Miko handles basic shrine duties with her signature energetic flair.

title: エリート巫女Vtuber
overview: Miko proudly shows off her "elite" virtual shrine maiden status, attempting a ritual or self-promo that predictably turns into light-hearted, clumsy chaos.

title: 神の年末
overview: Miko tackles year-end shrine tasks like cleaning or quiet reflection, capturing the peaceful yet mysteriously cozy atmosphere of her daily routine.

title: ヒトデがしゃべった
overview: A bizarre encounter with a talking starfish (likely a quirky spirit visitor) leads to absurd, adorable exchanges at the shrine.

title: 元旦は忙しい
overview: Miko deals with the exhausted "salaryman fox" spirit, blending everyday shrine chores with her upbeat positivity amid the fox's weary antics.

title: 鳴るたい焼き
overview: Miko investigates a strange, ringing taiyaki pastry—probably a mysterious yet harmless shrine oddity resolved in pure cute fashion.

title: 高性能ロボットがやってきた
overview: An advanced robot visitor arrives, sparking Miko's ritual practice or dance attempts filled with her trademark fun mistakes.

title: 女の子とお話したい
overview: Miko enjoys laid-back downtime, chatting with a girl (or spirit), highlighting her cheerful and sociable personality in a relaxing moment.

title: ありがとう大空スバル
overview: Miko gives a heartfelt shout-out to Hololive's Oozora Subaru in a friendly cameo skit, tied to a simple task or warm interaction.

title: そろそろバレンタイン
overview: Miko prepares for Valentine's with chocolate-making or shrine-themed sweetness, wrapping the series on a cozy, positive high note.
